action_set_definitions.name: get_firewall_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the firewall, including operational status, rule list, default policy, and logging status.

action_set_definitions.name: add_rule
action_set_definitions.description: Adds a new security rule to the firewall policy engine.

priority.description: The priority of the rule (lower numbers usually indicate higher precedence).

action.description: The action to take when traffic matches the rule.

action_set_definitions.name: delete_rule
action_set_definitions.description: Removes an existing rule from the firewall to free up TCAM resources or modify policy logic.

rule_id.description: The unique identifier of the rule to be removed.

action_set_definitions.name: update_default_policy
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the global default action for traffic that does not match any specific rule.

state_description.rules: An ordered list of firewall policy objects containing priority, source, destination, port, protocol, and action.
state_description.default_policy: The default action taken if no rules match the traffic (e.g., 'ALLOW' or 'DENY').
state_description.logging_enabled: Indicates if the firewall is currently recording traffic logs.
state_description.status: The operational status of the firewall service.
